ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used to build the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model and its purpose */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the model was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the configuration */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size for training */,
  "num_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used in training (e.g., Adam, SGD) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the configuration was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being trained */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number of training */,
  "cid" INTEGER /* Configuration ID for the training session */,
  "size_of_parameters" INTEGER /* Size of model parameters in bytes */,
  "size_of_config" INTEGER /* Size of configuration data in bytes */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value recorded during training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value recorded during training */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start timestamp of the training session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End timestamp of the training session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the training session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the training session was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the training session was deleted (soft delete) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the training session (e.g., pending, running, completed, failed) */,
  "training_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_cid FOREIGN KEY ("cid") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, engineer, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "salt" TEXT /* Salt used for password hashing */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_artifacts" (
  "artifact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artifact */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session that generated the artifact */,
  "artifact_path" TEXT /* Path to the artifact file */,
  "artifact_type" TEXT /* Type of artifact (e.g., model weights, configuration file) */,
  "artifact_size" INTEGER /* Size of the artifact file in bytes */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the artifact was uploaded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the artifact was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artifact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_artifacts_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the training session */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value recorded */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the metrics were recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the information */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the log entry was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training history entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being trained */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the training */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "history_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the training history */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history entry was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the history entry was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_history_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_history_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES training_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training session related to the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., success, failure, warning) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was deleted (soft delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
